title: Sources & links — everything verified for this guide
body:
Every fact in this guide has a source. Click any link below to verify it yourself or check for updates.

GO Fest 2026

  • GO Fest 2026 Copenhagen — official tickets & add-on prices · Park ticket 200 kr, Premier Access 640 kr, Raid Lover 112 kr, Egg-thusiast 112 kr
  • Official gameplay page · Wild spawns, raid bosses, event bonuses (all ticket holders + citywide hours)
  • In-person experiences · Park zones (Recruitment, Conservatory, Cultivation, Rocket Hideout), Trainer Challenges, Zeraora Special Research
  • GO Fest × LEGO — official announcement · LEGO store hours, Stamp Rally (5 stamps = Pikachu with Special Background), LEGO Timed Research
  • Know Before You Go — in-person events guide · Egg-thusiast 10 km Egg boost; Premier Access Lounge (first European location)
  • Leek Duck — GO Fest 2026 Copenhagen full breakdown · Regional analysis, shiny status per species, Comfey regional confirmation, Combat Breed city assignments, Wash Rotom world debut

Transport & transit

  • DOT City Pass — official pricing page · 24h 100 DKK / 48h 160 DKK / 96h 280 DKK / 120h 340 DKK (Small, zones 1–4 incl. airport). No 72h option exists.
  • Rejseplanen · Official Copenhagen transit journey planner
  • Go Nordic Cruiseline · Copenhagen–Oslo overnight ferry (formerly DFDS route, operator changed Nov 2024). Departs 16:30 Copenhagen / arrives 10:00 Oslo. Terminal: Dampfærgevej 30.
  • Copenhagen Card — verified prices · 589 DKK / 24h · 859 DKK / 48h · 1,039 DKK / 72h (all zones + 80+ attractions free)

Attractions

  • Tivoli Gardens — ticket booking · Dynamic (date-based) pricing from ≈150 DKK in summer. Buy in advance to skip the queue.
  • Grundtvig's Church — opening hours (VisitCopenhagen) · Closed Mondays. ⚠ Sources disagree and the church's own site (grundtvigskirke.dk) is offline: this trip recorded Tue–Sat 10:00–15:45 / Sun 12:30–15:45 in Jun 2026; VisitCopenhagen now lists 10:00–16:00. Closed-Mondays is the only part both agree on.
  • Reffen street food market · Food stalls open 11:30–21:30 daily

Food & markets

  • Torvehallerne food market · Mon–Sat 10:00–18:00, Sun 10:00–18:00 (some stalls vary)
  • Folkehuset Absalon — communal dinner · Sønder Blvd 73. 75 DKK Sun–Wed, 100 DKK Thu–Sat. Served at 18:00 daily; book online by 16:00.
  • Selma — Michelin Bib Gourmand · Rømersgade 20. Modern smørrebrød at lunch.

Tours & activities

  • GetYourGuide — Copenhagen canal tours · Stromma classic canal tour ≈129 DKK / Netto-Bådene budget option ≈60 DKK per adult
  • RED Sightseeing (Stromma) — hop-on-hop-off bus · 24h ≈199–299 DKK per adult (verify before booking)

Health & safety

  • Steno Apotek · Vesterbrogade 6C, Copenhagen. Denmark's only 24-hour pharmacy. +45 33 14 82 66. Use night bell after 23:00.

Norway (Oslo)

  • Go Nordic Cruiseline — Oslo sightseeing & HMK tours · Oslo Panorama 3-hr tour 332 NOK (~$35 USD) after 15% cruise discount; 5.5-hr Discovery tour 579 NOK. Book in advance.
  • Oslo Opera House guide · Marble roof free, open 24/7 in summer; foyer free to enter
  • Aker Brygge — Visit Oslo · Free open-air waterfront promenade; restaurants and design shops in converted shipyard buildings
  • Akershus Fortress guide · Grounds free, open daily 06:00–21:00; interior ≈150 NOK adult (verify at visitoslo.com)

Sweden (Malmö)

  • Malmöhus Castle — opening hours · Tue–Wed, Fri–Sun 11:00–17:00; Thu 11:00–19:00; closed Mondays. Jun 10 (Wed) open 11:00–17:00. Entry ≈120 SEK adult.
  • Malmö Saluhall — food hall · Gibraltargatan 6. Wed 11:00–20:00. Fresh fish, ramen, Skåne ice cream.
  • Visit Sweden — Malmö shopping guide · Form/Design Center, Uma Bazaar, Liebling, Filippa K, Grandpa
  • Turning Torso — Visit Skåne · Exterior viewing free 24/7; private residence, no regular public access to upper floors

Connectivity

  • Verizon TravelPass · $12/line/day in Denmark, Sweden and Norway. 5 GB high-speed per 24h window.
  • Verizon Unlimited Ultimate · 15 GB international roaming included; TravelPass cannot be added to this plan.
